    <item>
      <title>Five-time NBA All-Star issues upset alert for Nuggets-Timberwolves series</title>
      <description>The first-round matchup between the Denver Nuggets and Minnesota Timberwolves carries more weight than most NBA playoff openers. Both teams entered the season expecting a legitimate title run, and their recent history adds another layer to the intrigue. </description>

    <item>
      <title>Paolo Banchero earns redemption in Magic's win over Hornets</title>
      <description>In earning some redemption and continuing to make a name for himself, Paolo Banchero put on a show on Friday night.   Banchero's performance led the Orlando Magic to a 121-90 win over the Charlotte Hornets, securing an actual spot in the NBA playoffs. </description>
      <pubDate>17 Apr 2026 22:35:48 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/paolo_banchero_earns_redemption_in_magics_win_over_hornets/s1_13132_43741913</link>
      <guid>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/paolo_banchero_earns_redemption_in_magics_win_over_hornets/s1_13132_43741913</guid>

        <media:credit> Mike Watters-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Charlotte Hornets guard Sion James (4) defends Orlando Magic forward Paolo Banchero (5) during the second half of the play-in rounds of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Kia Center. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>Orlando Magic</category>
      <category>Charlotte Hornets</category>
      <category>Detroit Pistons</category>
      <category>Philadelphia 76ers</category>
      <category>Desmond Bane</category>

    </item>

    <item>
      <title>Defense wins play-in games: Magic shut down Hornets offense to earn final playoff spot in East</title>

    <item>
      <title>Warriors' Steve Kerr answers critics with play-in upset over Clippers</title>
      <description>Steve Kerr has won four championships with the Golden State Warriors and reached the NBA Finals six times as a head coach. Yet he's faced a slew of criticism of his coaching this season as the injured Warriors slumped to a 37-win season.</description>
      <pubDate>18 Apr 2026 00:03:50 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/warriors_steve_kerr_answers_critics_with_play_in_upset_over_clippers/s1_13132_43740784</link>
      <guid>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/warriors_steve_kerr_answers_critics_with_play_in_upset_over_clippers/s1_13132_43740784</guid>

      <media:content url="http://www.yardbarker.com/media/c/f/cfd3673bc1cc4ef42adb880ee7781a1f1b77a11b/thumb_16x9/steve-kerr-answers-critics-play-upset-over.jpg">
        <media:credit> Jayne Kamin-Oncea-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Golden State Warriors head coach Steve Kerr in the second half against the Los Angeles Clippers during the play-in rounds of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Intuit Dome.  </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>Golden State Warriors</category>
      <category>Atlanta Hawks</category>
      <category>Los Angeles Clippers</category>
      <category>Draymond Green</category>
      <category>Steve Kerr</category>
      <category>Jonathan Kuminga</category>
      <category>Al Horford</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>NBA stars under the most pressure to perform in playoffs</title>
      <description>It's often said that the true legends step up their game when it matters the most. So, with the NBA playoffs here, the teams able to advance will often rely on their top players to take their game to another level. </description>

    <item>
      <title>20 NBA stars who were overshadowed by teammates</title>

    <item>
      <title>The 'Most 3's-per-game in NBA history' quiz</title>
      <description>There are 45 players in NBA history that have averaged at least 2.0 made three-pointers-per-game in their career. How many of those players can you name in six minutes?</description>
      <pubDate>17 Apr 2026 15:00:46 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/the_most_3s_per_game_in_nba_history_quiz/s1__43739953</link>

    <item>
      <title>The 25 best NBA players who were better in the playoffs</title>
      <description>The regular season is important, but ultimately, it's all about the playoffs. Under the bright lights, some guys really embrace the moment, elevating their games another level to meet the situation. </description>
      <pubDate>17 Apr 2026 13:09:32 -0400</pubDate>
